metadata.name: Refer a Client to Senior Services

description: A social worker determines that an elderly client needs additional support, such as meal delivery and transportation.

nodes.task_description: Identify the elderly client's case file.

expected_outcome.value: The social worker pulls up the correct case.

nodes.task_description: Assess the client's needs for additional support services.

expected_outcome.value: The social worker identifies a need for Meals on Wheels and senior transportation.

nodes.task_description: Make formal referrals to the appropriate partner agencies for these services.

expected_outcome.value: The social worker submits referrals to the local Area Agency on Aging.
